data.name: Apkg is an APT repository server and Debian package publishing platform. Host it when you need signed repository snapshots, upstream Ubuntu mirror ingestion, API-key package publishing, and browser-based operations for repositories, certificates, users, roles, and jobs.
data.value: Apkg is an APT repository server and Debian package publishing platform. Host it when you need signed repository snapshots, upstream Ubuntu mirror ingestion, API-key package publishing, and browser-based operations for repositories, certificates, users, roles, and jobs.

data.name: Apkg uses SQLite by default. For production MySQL, edit the ConnectionStrings section in appsettings.json and set DbType to MySql with your server connection string.
data.value: Apkg uses SQLite by default. For production MySQL, edit the ConnectionStrings section in appsettings.json and set DbType to MySql with your server connection string.

data.name: Change the default administrator password immediately.
data.value: Change the default administrator password immediately.

data.name: Create repositories for every distro, suite, and architecture that package publishers will target.
data.value: Create repositories for every distro, suite, and architecture that package publishers will target.

data.name: Execute `dotnet run --project src/Aiursoft.Apkg/Aiursoft.Apkg.csproj` to run the app.
data.value: Run `dotnet run --project src/Aiursoft.Apkg/Aiursoft.Apkg.csproj` to start the app.

data.name: Execute `npm install` at `src/Aiursoft.Apkg/wwwroot` folder to install the dependencies.
data.value: Run `npm install` in the `src/Aiursoft.Apkg/wwwroot` folder to install the dependencies.

data.name: First, install Docker. Then run the following commands in a Linux shell:
data.value: First, install Docker. Then run the following commands in a Linux shell:

data.name: Local accounts are enabled by default. Set AppSettings:AuthProvider to OIDC and fill the OIDC section when you want to delegate sign-in to an identity provider.
data.value: Local accounts are enabled by default. Set AppSettings:AuthProvider to OIDC and complete the OIDC section when you wish to delegate sign-in to an identity provider.

data.name: Open the `.sln` file in the project path.
data.value: Open the `.sln` file in the project path.

data.name: Put the site behind your normal TLS and network controls.
data.value: Put the site behind your standard TLS and network controls.

data.name: Replace the seeded signing certificate before serving real repositories.
data.value: Replace the seeded signing certificate before serving live repositories.

data.name: Storage:Path keeps package objects, local packages, avatars, and GPG keyrings. Storage:ExportPath keeps exported static repository artifacts. Both paths should be durable on a real server.
data.value: Storage:Path stores package objects, local packages, avatars, and GPG keyrings. Storage:ExportPath stores exported static repository artefacts. Both paths should be durable on a real server.

data.name: That will start a web server at http://localhost:5000 and you can test the app.
data.value: That will start a web server at http://localhost:5000 and you can test the app.

data.name: The Docker image checks http://localhost:5000/health. Use the same endpoint for external uptime monitoring after the app has started.
data.value: The Docker image checks http://localhost:5000/health. Use the same endpoint for external uptime monitoring after the app has started.

data.name: The Docker image installs gnupg and ubuntu-keyring for repository signing and upstream signature verification. Persist /data because it stores appsettings.json, the SQLite database, package objects, avatars, and GPG keyrings.
data.value: The Docker image installs gnupg and ubuntu-keyring for repository signing and upstream signature verification. Persist /data because it stores appsettings.json, the SQLite database, package objects, avatars, and GPG keyrings.

data.name: The following script will install/update this app on your Ubuntu server. Supports Ubuntu 25.04.
data.value: The following script will install/update this app on your Ubuntu server. Supports Ubuntu 25.04.
